## ERT1.3. Rate of using available airspace structures (PI#11)

FINLAND reports that:

-   The ratio of the use of the available airspace structures is **13.48%** (via available restricted and segregated airspaces)

-   The ratio of the use of the available airspace structure is **42.26%** (via available conditional routes -- CDR)

*[Comment]{.underline}*

*Finland does not have this data, data provided by NM*
